title: Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the story arc|the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' trade paperback]]}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:TOTJDLOS1-FC.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi -
Dark Lords of the Sith'' |writer=*[[Tom Veitch]] *[[Kevin J. Anderson]] |penciller=*[[Chris Gossett]] *[[Art Wetherell]] |inker=*[[Mike Barreiro]] *[[Jordi Ensign]] |letterer=[[Willie Schubert]] |colorist=[[Pamela Rambo]] |cover artist=[[Hugh Fleming]] |editor=*[[Dan Thorsland]] *[[Ryder Windham]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[October 1]], [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-518/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi---Dark-Lords-of-the-Sith-1-of-6|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith #1 (of 6)}} |end date=[[March 14]], [[1995]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54576/star_wars_tales_of_the_jedi_-_dark_lords_of_the_sith_1994_6|text=Star Wars: Tales Of The Jedi - Dark Lords Of The Sith (1994) #6}} {{C|First printing}} |schedule= |format=Comic book |issues=6 |timeline=[[3997 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries written by [[Tom Veitch]] and [[Kevin J. Anderson]]. It is the third miniseries in the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] comic series, and it follows the events of the previous miniseries, ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]''. ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' ran from [[1994]] to [[1995]], and it was followed by the sequel miniseries ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War]]''. [[HighBridge Audio]] released an [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] of the comic. ==Plot summary== [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] and [[Nomi Sunrider]] are enjoying a peaceful time in the galaxy until the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] strike against the Jedi. At a secret Jedi meeting, the Krath place servant droids which are really programmed to kill. Many Jedi are wounded and killed including Qel-Droma's own Master Arca. Qel-Droma seeks revenge against the Krath. During his "mission," he struggles to hold on to the light side of the force and resist becoming the next Dark Jedi. ==Continuity== While [[Dark Horse Comics]]' timeline included in comics they published by the time of ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]'', [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']], ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', and the [[Dark Horse Comics]] [[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2|omnibus for ''Dark Lords of the Sith'']] date ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' to [[3997 BBY]],''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2]]'' the timeline included in the article [[The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1]], which was published in [[Star Wars Insider 26]], says that the [[Political uprising of the Empress Teta system]] and the [[Conclave at Deneba]] happened in [[3996 BBY]] and that [[Duel in the Iron Citadel (Exar Kun)|Exar Kun became a Dark Lord of the Sith]] in 3991 BBY{{InsiderCite|26|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1}} and the timeline included in comics published by Dark Horse such as [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith'']] and ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' dated ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' to 3992 BBY, approximately six years after [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising|''The Freedon Nadd Uprising'']].''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith]]''''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith}} ===Issues=== *''[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith Special
